task.en: In Reminders, create a single reminder in the default list (the first list shown in the sidebar) with: title `Submit Q3 expense report` (exactly), due date `June 15, 2026` at `9:00 AM`. Do not add any other reminders.

pre_command: osascript -e 'tell application "Reminders" to delete every reminder' 2>/dev/null; osascript -e 'tell application "Reminders" to quit' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
grading_command: D=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Reminders" to get due date of (first reminder whose name is "Submit Q3 expense report")' 2>/dev/null); echo "$D" | grep -q "June 15, 2026" && echo "$D" | grep -q "9:00:00 AM" && echo True || echo False
